<includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}}
|acid = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=2
	|stats={{Color|green|+8}} Max HP<br>{{Color|red|-2}} % Dodge<br>{{Color|red|-2}} Knockback
	|price=65
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Max HP]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|adrenaline = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+5}} % Dodge<br>{{Color|green|50%}} chance to heal {{Color|green|5}} HP when dodging an attack
	|price=60
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=1
	|tags=[[Dodge]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alien baby = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+15}} Max HP<br>{{Color|red|+10}} % Enemy health
	|price=80
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Max HP]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alien eyes = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=2
	|stats=Shoots {{Color|green|6}} alien eyes around you every {{Color|green|3}} seconds dealing {{Color|green|6}} ({{Color|green|+50%{{StatIcon|Max HP}}}}) damage each
	|price=50
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Max HP]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alien magic = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+8}} Max HP<br>{{Color|green|+3}} HP Regeneration<br>{{Color|red|-8}} Luck
	|price=85
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Max HP]], [[HP Regeneration]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alien tongue = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|stats={{Color|green|+30%}} pickup range<br>{{Color|green|+1}} Knockback
	|price=25
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Pickup]], [[Knockback]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alien worm = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|stats={{Color|green|+3}} Max HP<br>{{Color|green|+2}} HP Regeneration<br>{{Color|red|-1}} HP recovered from consumables
	|price=15
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Max HP]], [[HP Regeneration]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|alloy = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+3}} Melee Damage<br>{{Color|green|+3}} Ranged Damage<br>{{Color|green|+3}} Elemental Damage<br>{{Color|green|+3}} Engineering<br>{{Color|green|+5}} % Crit Chance<br>{{Color|red|-6}} % Dodge
	|price=80
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Melee Damage]], [[Ranged Damage]], [[Engineering]], [[Crit Chance]], [[Elemental Damage]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|anvil = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=4
	|stats=A random weapon is upgraded when entering a shop. If you have no weapon to upgrade, you gain {{Color|green|+2}} {{Color|green|Armor}} instead.
	|price=120
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=Win a run with [[File:Arms Dealer.png|link=Arms Dealer|x30px]] [[Arms Dealer]]
	|limit=1
	|tags=
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|ashes = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=4
	|stats={{Color|green|+20}} % Damage<br>{{Color|green|+20}} % Attack Speed<br>{{Color|green|+100}} Range<br>{{Color|red|-1}} {{Color|red|Armor}} at the end of a wave
	|price=100
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags= [[Attack Speed]], [[Damage]], [[Range]]
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}
|axolotl = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=4
	|stats=Your highest ({{Color|green|Max HP}}) and lowest ({{Color|green|Max HP}}) positive primary stats are swapped when you get this item
	|price=130
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=1
	|tags=
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}
|baby elephant = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|stats={{Color|green|25%}} chance to deal {{Color|green|1}} ({{Color|green|25%{{StatIcon|Luck}}}}) damage to a random enemy when you pick up a material
	|price=22
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Luck]], [[Pickup]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|baby gecko = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|stats={{Color|green|+10}} Range<br>{{Color|green|+25%}} chance to instantly attract a material when it’s dropped
	|price=18
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=4
	|tags=[[Pickup]], [[Range]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|baby squid = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=2
	|stats={{Color|green|+1}} {{Color|green|HP Regeneration}} when you level up<br>{{Color|red|-3}} % Attack Speed
	|price=55
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[HP Regeneration]]
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}
|baby with a beard = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats=One bullet dealing {{Color|green|1}} ({{Color|green|+100%{{StatIcon|Ranged Damage}}}}) damage is fired from an enemy corpse when they die<br>{{Color|red|-50}} Range
	|price=100
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Ranged Damage]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|bag = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|stats={{Color|green|+15}} materials when you pick up a crate<br>{{Color|red|-1}} % Speed
	|price=15
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=3
	|tags=[[Luck]], [[Exploration]], [[Economy]]

|bait = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=2
	|stats={{Color|green|+8}} % Damage<br>Special enemies appear at the beginning of the next wave
	|price=25
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Damage]], [[Number of Enemies]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|ball and chain = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+15}} % Damage<br>{{Color|green|+3}} Armor<br>{{Color|green|+5}} Knockback<br>{{Color|red|-3}} % Speed<br>Weapons have a minimum cooldown of {{Color|red|0.75}} seconds between attacks
	|price=75
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=1
	|tags=[[Damage]], [[Armor]], [[Knockback]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|bandana = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}

	|stats=Projectiles pierce through {{Color|green|1}} additional target<br>{{Color|red|-10}} % Damage
	|price=75
	|unique=

	|limit=
	|tags=[[Ranged Damage]]

}}

	|unlockedby=Win a run with [[File:Creature.png|link=Creature|x30px]] [[Creature]]

}}

	|stats=This turret's stats are derived from your best ranged weapon's base stats and scale with {{Color|green|Engineering}} ({{Color|green|-}})<br>{{Color|green|+1}} projectile when you reach {{Color|green|30}} {{Color|green|Structure Range}}
	|price=1
	|unique=true

	|#default=-

|community support = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+1}} {{Color|green|% Attack Speed}} for every current living enemy <br>{{Color|red|-2}} Armor
	|price=75
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=Win a run with [[File:Streamer.png|link=Streamer|x30px]] [[Streamer]]
	|limit=1
	|tags=[[Attack Speed]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Attack Speed]]
	|isdlc=1

	|rarity=4
	|stats=Turns back time, decreasing the current wave count by {{Color|green|1}}<br>Start the next wave with 1 HP
	|price=100
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=During the last 5 seconds of a wave after wave 2, press 'Return to Main Menu'. Then press 'Resume' to try the wave again.
	|limit=1
	|tags=
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

}}

	|rarity=1

	|price=100

	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=

}}

	|rarity=4
	|stats=You have a {{Color|green|50%}} chance to explode for {{Color|green|10}} ({{Color|green|+500%{{StatIcon|Curse}}}}) damage when you get hit<br>{{Color|green|+10}} Max HP<br>{{Color|curse|+10}} Curse
	|price=110
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=1

	|price=15

	|rarity=2
	|stats={{Color|green|+6}} % Damage<br>{{Color|green|+2}} % Life Steal<br>{{Color|red|-2}} Engineering
	|price=60
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=Win a run with [[File:Ghost.png|link=Ghost|x30px]] [[Ghost]]
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Damage]], [[Life Steal]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-

	|rarity=2

	|price=40
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=

|will-o'-wisp = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+1}} Elemental Damage for every {{Color|green|30}} burning enemies you kill during a wave (max {{Color|green|+4}} per wave)<br>{{Color|red|-7}}% Attack Speed
	|price=80
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=Kill 30 enemies by burning them in a single wave
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Elemental Damage]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|wings = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+10}} % Speed<br>{{Color|green|+30}} Range<br>{{Color|red|-2}} Elemental Damage
	|price=85
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Speed]], [[Range]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|wisdom = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|stats={{Color|green|+5}} {{Color|green|% Damage}} every 5 seconds until the end of the wave<br>{{Color|red|-15}} % Damage
	|price=85
	|unique=true
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=1
	|tags=[[Damage]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|wolf helmet = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=4
	|stats={{Color|green|+10}} Elemental Damage<br>{{Color|green|+20}} Luck<br>{{Color|red|-5}} Engineering
	|price=90
	|unique=
	|unlockedby=
	|limit=
	|tags=[[Elemental Damage]], [[Luck]]
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|#default=Item name not found}}</includeonly><noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Item Data
|any item name
|rarity/stats/price/unique/unlockedby/limit/isdlc
}}
</pre>

Example:
<pre>
{{Item Data|acid|rarity}}
</pre>
{{Item Data|acid|rarity}}


Example:
<pre>
{{Item Data|acid|stats}}
</pre>
{{Item Data|acid|stats}}


Example: No options passed
<pre>
{{Item Data|acid}}
</pre>
{{Item Data|acid}}


Example: Not an item
<pre>
{{Item Data|Knife}}
</pre>
{{Item Data|Knife}}

Example: Check if the item is part of the {{DLCLink|Abyssal Terrors DLC}}
<pre>
{{Item Data|acid|isdlc}}
{{Item Data|axolotl|isdlc}}
</pre>
{{Item Data|acid|isdlc}}
<br>{{Item Data|axolotl|isdlc}}


<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Name",
			"example": "Acid",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Data",
			"example": "price",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata></noinclude>
